# Quy Nhon Life
> Live vessel tracking, sunset predictions, and coastal guide for Quy Nhon, Vietnam

## What is Quy Nhon Life?
Quy Nhon Life is a free, real-time vessel tracking portal for Quy Nhon Bay in Binh Dinh province, central Vietnam. It provides live AIS (Automatic Identification System) data received via a local RTL-SDR radio antenna, showing the position, speed, destination, and details of all vessels in the area.

## Features
- **Live Vessel Tracking**: Real-time positions of ~60 vessels including cargo ships, tankers, fishing boats, and passenger vessels in Quy Nhon Bay
- **Sunset Quality Predictions**: Proprietary prediction model analyzing cloud layers, atmospheric haze, humidity, and precipitation to forecast sunset color quality (Spectacular, Vivid, Nice, or Ordinary)
- **What's That Boat?**: Point your phone at any vessel from shore to identify it using GPS and compass
- **Weather Data**: Live temperature, wind, humidity, wave height, sunrise/sunset times from Open-Meteo
- **Port Statistics**: Total vessels, underway count, anchored count, and daily activity
- **5 Languages**: English, Vietnamese, Korean, Chinese, Japanese

## Location
Quy Nhon (Quy Nhon) is a coastal city in Binh Dinh province, central Vietnam (13.76°N, 109.23°E). The port serves as a major commercial harbor for the central Vietnam region.

## Data Source
AIS vessel data is received live via RTL-SDR hardware (RTL2832U+R820T2 dongle) positioned at approximately 80m elevation overlooking Quy Nhon Bay, with a reception range of approximately 50-70 km.

## URLs
- Homepage: https://quynhonlife.com/
- Vessel Identifier: https://quynhonlife.com/spot
- Privacy Policy: https://quynhonlife.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://quynhonlife.com/terms
